targets.rawSql: SELECT sleep_date AS time, deep_h AS "Deep" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date
SELECT sleep_date AS time, core_h AS "Core" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date
SELECT sleep_date AS time, rem_h AS "REM" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date
SELECT sleep_date AS time, awake_h AS "Awake" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date
SELECT sleep_date AS time, total_sleep_h AS "Total Sleep (h)" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date

SELECT sleep_date AS time, ROUND((total_sleep_h / NULLIF(in_bed_h,0) * 100)::numeric,1) AS "Efficiency (%)" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) AND in_bed_h > 0 ORDER BY sleep_date

SELECT sleep_date AS time, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sleep_start AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Vienna') + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM sleep_start AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Vienna')/60.0 AS "Bedtime (hour)" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date

SELECT ref_date AS "Date", kind AS "Kind", note AS "Note", ROUND(severity::numeric,2) AS "Severity" FROM findings WHERE kind IN ('anomaly','consistency') AND (metric_a LIKE 'sleep%' OR metric_a = 'consistency') AND ref_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY ref_date DESC
